response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience that far exceeds the 6-year minimum, with direct production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple roles. The AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq is a rare and direct match for the role's emerging AI agent requirement, which few candidates will satisfy. NestJS is not explicitly mentioned and Kotlin is absent, but the depth of the surrounding stack and demonstrated ability to pick up new frameworks quickly makes these manageable gaps.
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React production experience across multiple roles at scale
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work directly satisfies the role's AI agent development requirement
Consistent TDD culture evidenced by teaching workshops, building testing libraries, and applying craftsmanship practices across employers
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume, which is the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin absent from all listed skills and employment history
Vitest, Jest, and Playwright not explicitly named despite a clear testing background
